title: bidens ruyigiensis
intro: Bidens ruyigiensis, also known as Burundian Bidens, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in Burundi and other parts of Africa for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. Bidens ruyigiensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
